propositions: The auto-lander service and all its cloud and host resources should be removed because it is unused and incurs cost.
Repo changes delete the autolander Dockerfile, compose service, autoheal sidecar, volumes, nginx status location, SSM param, CloudWatch alarm, and related script references.
fetch-secrets.sh fail-fasts on a blank autolander-gerrit-token, so the code change removing that fetch must deploy to the host before terraform destroys the SSM param.
Teardown must follow a staged order: land the code change, drop the autolander/autoheal containers and volumes, then terraform apply to destroy the alarm and SSM param.
Acceptance requires no autolander container, volumes, alarm, or SSM param remaining, a clean host stack boot, and an empty terraform plan with lint/typecheck/test green.
The bot stays paused throughout the decommission since it is being deleted.
